title: 2025-12-30 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 3.01
description: New daily signal for 2025-12-30: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 3.01/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-12-30, the score printed 3.01/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
